retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from official public pages, account pages, and SOC PDF. Normalize before shipping to UI.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced fee of PKR 1,200 on spending PKR 25,000 within 1 month of activation.

notes: Shared product table shows a PKR 70,000 monthly salary threshold across surfaced credit-card variants.
Public credit-card material is income-based and does not surface a deposit threshold for this unsecured product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced fee of PKR 3,100 on spending PKR 100,000 within 1 month of activation.

notes: Public credit-card material is income-based and does not surface a deposit threshold for this unsecured product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Annual fee waived for JS Inclusive Current Account.

notes: JS Asaan Current Account page states no minimum monthly average balance and low initial deposit of PKR 100.
JS Bank's Mar 2026 deposit KFS also surfaces nil balance-to-keep on its low-balance current-account variants.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free annual fee on JS PLS Savings Account when PKR 250,000 monthly average balance is maintained.

notes: Annual fee PKR 1,650 from Jul-Dec 2025 SOC. Annual retention fee PKR 950.
Current JS PLS Savings public page makes the clearest current official waiver route: free Gold debit card annual fee at PKR 250,000 monthly average balance.
This remains an account-linked debit card rather than a salary-gated retail card.
JS Priority Banking threshold appears as PKR 3 million for current account or PKR 8 million for savings account based on 3-month average balance.
Annual fee PKR 1,200 from Jul-Dec 2025 SOC.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free on JS HER Current Account when PKR 50,000 average balance is maintained.

notes: Women-targeted card. Current JS HER public material surfaces PKR 50,000 as the average-balance threshold for free Titanium debit annual fee.
Earlier lower-balance thresholds were replaced with the current official public JS HER route.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Annual fee waived on JS Platinum Business Current Account when PKR 150,000 average balance is maintained over the past three months.

notes: Annual fee PKR 3,000 from Jul-Dec 2025 SOC.
Current public JS Platinum Business Current Account page surfaces a clear annual-fee-waiver route at PKR 150,000 average balance over the past three months.
Annual fee PKR 1,200. Annual retention fee PKR 1,100. No salary or balance threshold found.

cards.card_name: Private Banking Visa Signature Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 7,700 if PKR 150,000 spent within first month

notes: Reduced fee model — bank retains PKR 7,700 even after spend target achieved. No public income threshold.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 2,000 if PKR 50,000 spent

notes: Reduced fee model — PKR 2,000 retained after spend target. No public income threshold.

gaps: Public pages did not cleanly expose age criteria for either debit or credit cards.
Debit-card eligibility is often account-product dependent rather than card-page driven.
The shared credit-card salary threshold may be simplified and should be verified variant-by-variant later.
